subject: Follow up on upgrade proposal
notes: Reviewed Enterprise pricing with Anna. She raised concern about 20% increase vs. last year. Agreed to prepare ROI analysis showing efficiency gains. CFO approval needed before proceeding.

subject: Discuss renewal options
notes: Joe confirmed they want to renew but need updated pricing by Feb 15. Budget cycle starts March 1. He prefers 1-year term over multi-year due to uncertainty.

subject: Executive introduction
notes: First meeting with CFO Beth Turner. She controls final budget approval. Historically skeptical of software ROI claims. Prepare concrete metrics from similar manufacturing customers.

subject: Quarterly business review
notes: Usage up 40% vs last quarter - strong adoption signal. Lisa mentioned expansion to marketing team. Will schedule demo for marketing director next week. Discussed roadmap alignment.

subject: Security questionnaire
notes: Sam is driving security review for enterprise procurement. Need to provide SOC2 Type II report and penetration test results. Legal wants data processing agreement reviewed by Jan 20.

subject: Executive demo
notes: Final demo for CEO Omar. Focus on dashboard and reporting capabilities - he's metrics-driven. Prepare 3 customer case studies from similar B2B SaaS companies. Deal closes if this goes well.

subject: Renewal check-in
notes: Maria expressed frustration with mobile app performance. Support ticket open for 2 weeks. Need to escalate before renewal discussion. She's otherwise happy with the product.

subject: Advanced training
notes: Train 5 power users on advanced reporting. Nina requested custom dashboard templates for inventory forecasting. Prepare examples from retail customers.

subject: API usage review
notes: Review API integration health with Alex. They're hitting rate limits during peak inventory updates. Discuss upgrade to higher API tier or optimize their batch processing.

subject: Renewal discussion
notes: Erin confirmed renewal but flagged concerns about price increase. Discussed grandfathering their rate for 1 more year given expansion opportunity. She agreed to champion internally.

subject: Expansion discussion
notes: Present proposal for 3 additional clinic locations. Erin is enthusiastic but needs board approval. Key objection expected around IT resource requirements. Prepare self-service implementation option.

subject: Support ticket follow-up
notes: Mike opened tickets about HIPAA audit logging. Current logs don't meet their compliance requirements. Engineering working on enhanced logging - ETA 2 weeks. Keep Mike updated.

subject: Trial wrap-up
notes: Trial ends Feb 28. Sanjay likes the product but worried about adoption - agents are resistant to change. Propose extended pilot with 2 champion agencies before full rollout.

subject: Feature demo
notes: Demo advanced booking features to Ravi's operations team. They want to see multi-leg itinerary handling and group booking workflows. Prepare travel agency specific use cases.

subject: Send proposal
notes: Prepare pricing proposal with volume discount for 200+ agents. Include comparison to their current Sabre-based workflow. Sanjay needs this for budget meeting Feb 20.

subject: Discuss seat expansion
notes: Emma confirmed need for 25 additional seats for new store openings. Wants same pricing as original contract. Check if we can honor the rate given volume increase.

subject: Contract review
notes: Send updated contract for legal review. Lars flagged concerns about new data processing terms in our updated MSA. Prepare redline showing changes from their current agreement.

subject: New user onboarding
notes: Onboard 15 newly hired sales reps. Ines requested focus on mobile app and offline mode for store visits. Schedule 2-hour session with hands-on exercises.

subject: Win-back outreach
notes: Carlos mentioned they might return after Q4 budget cycle. Solar division losses were the main churn reason - now stabilized. Prepare win-back offer with reduced pricing.

subject: Implementation kickoff
notes: Plan rollout milestones with Jacob. He wants go-live before Q2 shipping surge. Critical path: data migration and warehouse coordinator training. Assign dedicated CSM for implementation.

subject: Team training
notes: Train 8 logistics coordinators on daily workflows. Mei emphasized need for barcode scanner integration training. Prepare warehouse-specific quick reference guides.

subject: Billing setup
notes: Confirm billing preferences with Dan. They require PO numbers on all invoices and net-45 terms. Check if we can accommodate or need finance approval for extended terms.
